positive: Minimalist line-art illustration of a whimsical, bioluminescent woodland scene. A stylized, elegant fox sits atop a crescent moon, surrounded by glowing mushrooms and delicate vines. The composition must feature strong, contrasting silhouettes against a deep twilight blue and emerald green palette. Use clean, thick outlines and negative space to define shapes. Overhead light sources should provide a soft, ethereal glow, casting sharp, dramatic shadows suitable for a monochromatic print effect. Symmetry is suggested, but the fox and moons should feel natural and dynamic. Highly detailed, perfect for fabric printing, vector quality, mid-century modern aesthetic, ultra-detailed.
negative: text, signature, watermark, logo, blurry, low resolution, bad anatomy, malformed, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, grain, noise, photorealism, realistic background
